final:
// // This module implements a 2-to-1 demultiplexer instead of a multiplexer.
module top_module(
  input en,
  input [15:0]in0,
  input [15:0]in1,
  input  sel,

  output reg[15:0] out);always@(sel or en or in0 or in1 )
  begin
    if(!en)out <=16'd0;
    else
      case(sel)
       0:out <= in0;
       1:out <= in1;
       default:out <=16'd0; 
      endcase
  end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 2-to-1 demultiplexer instead of a multiplexer.
